02.1 · THE CFD COMPANIES
THE CFD COMPANIES
Three companies. One mission.

Under one umbrella, three independent companies serve advisers and their clients with complementary expertise.

cfd Investments, Inc.
Broker/Dealer · est. 1990
Independent broker/dealer serving CFD-affiliated advisers nationwide with concierge level support that honors the independence needed to best serve advisory clients.
Creative Financial Designs, Inc.
Registered Investment Adviser · est. 1982
Fiduciary RIA providing fee-based advisory services, in-house investment management, and BRI-screened portfolio strategies.
Creative Portfolio Management
Third-Party Asset Management
Full-service TPAM platform delivering institutional-grade portfolios — including BRI strategies — to independent advisers outside the CFD Companies network.
Three companies. One commitment to adviser independence.

[Speaker notes for slide 10]
03.2 · COMMISSIONS
COMMISSION PROCEDURES
48 RUNS PER YEAR
Commissions are run four times per month — 48 total per year. Pull your commission statement weekly from the Dashboard at cfdinvestments.com. View pending commissions at end of each business day under Forecast Commissions.
EFT DEPOSITS
All commissions are deposited via Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT) directly into your checking account at no cost — more economical for both the Adviser and the Broker/Dealer.
COLOR-CODED NEWSLETTER
Green name — expect an EFT that week. Blue or Red name — no EFT for that run. All 48 statements and newsletters archived on the B/D website.
DEBIT BALANCE POLICY
If a debit balance is not covered by new commissions by the end of the quarterly management fee run, a valid credit card on file will be charged for the entire debit balance.
[Speaker notes for slide 11]

RENEWING FOR 2026
cfd Investments pays each Adviser's home state renewal fee. Advisers pay non-resident state fees. FINRA branch charge: $250/renewal period. FSI Membership optional.

04.2 · TECH PACKAGES
TECHNOLOGY PACKAGES
$250/month — all packages
STANDARD PACKAGE 1 — Advisers ≤ $499,999/year
Ash Brokerage quote engine & case monitoring · cfdinvestments.com website access · Commissions Dashboard (Sycamore) · Docupace with ePacs · DST Vision · Quest CE Firm Element · KnowBe4 Education & Awareness · Office 365 E1 · Proofpoint Essentials · Redtail CRM · Redtail Speak · SMARSH e-mail archiving · Annuity Intelligence Report
STANDARD PACKAGE 2 — $500,000–$999,999/year
All of Package 1 + Albridge/Pershing X: Light version
STANDARD PACKAGE 3 — $1,000,000+/year
All of Package 2 + Albridge/Pershing X: Full version
GDC based on 12/31/2025 year-end. Upgrades not applied until Tech Renewal 01/31/2026 unless added à la carte.

May 1, 2026 – April 30, 2027

IA only:

04.5 · E-DELIVERY
ACCOUNT SERVICES & E-DELIVERY
FIGURE 5.6 — Go Green, Save Your Clients Money
NFS E-DELIVERY REWARDS
Clients who do not opt into e-Delivery will be charged a $60.00 annual NFS mailing fee each May. If insufficient cash is available, the fee is charged to adviser commissions.
Encourage clients to opt in — save them $60/yr!
  • Sign up via Wealthscape Investor
  • Information available at adviser.cfdinvestments.com
CFD E-DELIVERY
Signing up for e-Delivery through CFD is separate from NFS — applies only to cfd Investments and/or Creative Financial Designs email preferences.
  • Clients can opt in or out at any time
  • Opting out may incur mailing charges for certain correspondence
  • Having clients opt in has never been easier
adviser.cfdinvestments.com/knowledge-base/how-do-i-get-clients-signed-up-for-e-delivery/
[Speaker notes for slide 21]
04.6 · STP & E-SIGNATURES
STP & E-SIGNATURES
FIGURE 6.0 — Straight Through Processing & Docupace
DOCUPACE CONNECT
A comprehensive, customizable, digital operations solution. Paperless tools designed to help you complete work faster, more securely, and with fewer errors.
  • One-stop for forms — populate from Redtail, complete online, go paperless
  • Built-in eSignature via DocuSign (included in tech package)
  • Create brokerage and direct business paperwork in one place
  • Custom barcode cover sheets for wet-signature work items
Docupace has three major software releases per year. Mailing paperwork to CFD incurs a $25 paperwork handling fee.
STARTING POINT — STP BENEFITS
  • Wizard technology gets paperwork ready and Docupace work item created
  • Add external forms or legal docs easily
  • Use built-in wet or electronic signature solutions
  • Feeds into our partnership with Docupace Technologies
E-mail and fax are NOT approved channels for delivering client paperwork to CFD. Use Docupace.
[Speaker notes for slide 22]
04.7 · WEBSITE PARTNERS
ADVISER WEBSITE PARTNERS
TWO APPROVED VENDORS  ·  YOUR CHOICE
FMG SUITE
FMG Suite provides an adviser marketing platform powered by award-winning content. Their products automate proven marketing strategies so advisers can build deeper relationships and grow AUM with the least effort.
  • Combines websites, e-mail, social, print, and events
  • Full compliance integration
  • Designed specifically for financial advisers
https://www.fmgsuite.com
BROADRIDGE
Broadridge offers an established adviser-marketing and website platform backed by enterprise-grade infrastructure. Their content library, compliance workflows, and website templates are built for regulated financial professionals.
  • Adviser websites with compliance-ready content
  • Integrated email and campaign tools
  • Enterprise reliability and archiving support
When using third-party website hosting, Smarsh is required for archiving.

04.9 · CYBER SECURITY
CYBER SECURITY PROGRAM
FEES
StatusMonthly Fee
Financial Advisers$100/month
Registered & Non-Registered Assistants$50/month
EDUCATION
Training and education on cyber threats via KnowBe4. Phishing tests and additional training based on results.
DEVICE MONITORING
Entreda monitors your equipment for encryption, anti-virus, malware, and firewall compliance.
VENDOR MANAGEMENT
CFD manages third-party vendor policies and procedures to protect your client data in the cloud.
PASSWORD MANAGEMENT
Keeper manages strong, effective passwords across all devices and permits secure sharing among staff.
TEXT MESSAGING
Redtail Speak provides compliant text messaging, monitored to satisfy regulatory requirements. Included in all Tech Packages.
CYBER INSURANCE
Direct coverage for you and your office for cyber incidents, including OBAs, and denial of service attacks.

05.1 · IN-HOUSE MANAGEMENT
Creative Financial Designs, Inc.
In-House Money Management
Empowering Financial Fulfillment
Your trusted partner in RIA solutions since 1982
An optional added service for CFD advisers

Creative provides financial advisers with their most valuable asset — time. Building a successful financial practice requires more than just expertise; it demands time and the right support. Creative delivers the solutions, resources, and products you need to grow efficiently while ensuring your clients receive the highest level of service.

"TIME IS REALLY THE ONLY CAPITAL THAT ANY HUMAN BEING HAS, AND THE ONLY THING HE CAN'T AFFORD TO LOSE." — Thomas Edison

[Speaker notes for slide 27]
05.2 · BRI
Biblically Responsible Investing
Value-Driven Investing for What Really Matters

Few broker/dealers offer in-house BRI management. CFD is one of them.

When it comes to investing, our clients have many choices. One of the most important is the opportunity to begin with their values and seek investments that reflect what matters most. From a Christian values perspective, this approach is known as Biblically Responsible Investing (BRI) — a flagship focus of Creative Financial Designs.

"The plans of the diligent lead to profit as surely as haste leads to poverty."
— Proverbs 21:5
Screening for Red Flags
Abortion  ·  Pornography  ·  Anti-Family Entertainment  ·  Anti-Family Lifestyle  ·  Anti-Human Rights  ·  Gambling  ·  Alcohol  ·  Tobacco
Screening for Positive Practices
Business Ethics  ·  Human Rights  ·  Ethical Labor  ·  Ethical Sales Practices  ·  Regulatory Adherence  ·  Product Safety  ·  Customer Privacy  ·  Community Impact
Over 2,300 Bible verses address money and stewardship.
[Speaker notes for slide 28]
05.3 · BRI STRATEGIES
BRI Managed Strategies
Eight strategies. Five portfolio objectives. One goal.
StrategyFocusMinimum
AuxanoBRI-screened all-equity growth$50,000
CombinationBRI mutual funds, ETFs & equities for diversified balance$50,000
Divinity ETFBRI-screened ETFs across five portfolio objectives$25,000
Harvest Growing DividendBRI stocks with growing dividend history$25,000
Income SolutionsBRI mega-cap value + fixed income$50,000
Purpose FundsBRI mutual funds & ETFs for core diversification$25,000
Tax-WiseTax-efficient BRI ETFs + screened municipals$100,000
Vision CFD4Values-managed with low minimums$7,000
Variable Annuity Management
Nationwide, Jackson National, and more. BRI-screened sub-accounts across five diversified portfolio objectives.
Retirement Plans
With select vendors, CFD offers managed BRI portfolios for options within company retirement plans.
Diversification does not ensure profit or protection from loss. All investments subject to volatility. Minimums subject to change.
[Speaker notes for slide 29]
05.4 · CPM
Creative Portfolio Management
A Full-Service TPAM for Independent Advisors

Creative Portfolio Management (CPM) is a full-service Third-Party Asset Management (TPAM) platform built for financial advisors who are not affiliated with the CFD Companies. CPM brings institutional-grade portfolio construction and the same Biblically Responsible Investing expertise that powers Creative Financial Designs — now available to the broader adviser community.

Institutional TPAM
Managed portfolios, model delivery, and operational support for independent RIAs and adviser teams.
BRI Specialty
The industry's deepest bench of BRI-screened strategies, available as sub-advised models or turnkey portfolios.
Independent-Adviser First
CPM serves advisors who keep their book, their brand, and their client relationships. You stay independent; we bring the back-end.
Contact CFD for CPM details
[Speaker notes for slide 30]

06.1 · ASSISTANTS
CFD ASSISTANTS
FIGURE 7.0 — Our Valued CFD Assistants
OBJECTIVES & HOW IT WORKS
  • Provide assistants with a point of contact at the home office
  • Build relationships across many office locations
  • Create an evolving learning environment
  • Multiple touch points throughout the year
Meetings are once per quarter via Zoom, 2:00–3:00 PM EST. Agenda sent one week prior.
2026 CFD NETWORKSHOP DATES
Jan 28th
Apr 22nd
Jul 22nd
Oct 21st
2026 ASSISTANT FEES
Technology Fee$100/mo
Cyber Security Fee$50/mo

All assistants must clear a background check. One-time $100 fingerprint fee at on-boarding. Contact Jeanne Miller in Compliance to bring on a new assistant.
[Speaker notes for slide 33]
06.2 · TRANSITION
THE ADVISER TRANSITION PROGRAM
FIGURE 7.2 — A way for advisers to bring in or transition new talent
WHAT IS IT?
A structured program for advisers to bring in someone new to the industry, transition an assistant to an adviser role, or provide a warm handoff for an adviser who has sold their book but wants to stay licensed.
SENIOR ADVISER REQUIREMENTS
  • GDC of $250,000 per person on ATP
  • 5 years industry experience
  • Operate out of same location
  • Cannot be on heightened supervision
WHY JOIN?
  • Reduced Technology/Cyber Security Fee
  • Reduced Renewal Fee
  • Start the Junior or Supporting Adviser at the Senior's payout level
  • Improve clarity of role with CFD home office staff
  • Comradery
ADVISER STATUSES
Supporting
Book owned by senior adviser
Junior
Building own book with mentorship
[Speaker notes for slide 34]
06.3 · VIRTUAL
VIRTUAL ASSISTANTS
FIGURE 7.3 — Grow With a Virtual Assistant
IS A VA RIGHT FOR YOU?
  • You don't have an assistant but some support would be beneficial
  • Your staff is overextended
  • You are between assistants or your assistant takes extended time off
  • You want to take your business to the next level
  • You are a new rep transitioning to CFD
OFFICE SUPPORT SERVICES
  • Account Management: Redtail data entry, paperwork generation, submission & follow-up
  • Scheduling, client communications, and more
SUCCESS STORY
"We've been working with the virtual assistants for a few years now and it's been an incredible blessing to our firm. They've gotten to know my preferences with paperwork and have made it so much easier on me… Even with an in-office assistant, the VA team adds tremendous value."
YOUR VA TEAM

[Speaker notes for slide 37]
07.2 · TEAM MEETINGS
TEAM CFD MEETINGS 2026
⚑
SEPTEMBER 17TH IS MANDATORY!
Some compliance departments are about policing… and we're proud that ours is about more. Team CFD is an opportunity for advisers and CFD to join arms and go beyond mere compliance. We need a connection that provides guidance, encouragement and helps us work together.
Team CFD is intended to go beyond mere compliance requirements — to lift spirits and provide resources that help advisers navigate the highs and lows of the financial industry.
2026 MEETING DATES
  • January 21–22 — Team CFD Meeting
  • January 28 — CFD Networkshop (Zoom)
  • April 22 — CFD Networkshop (Zoom)
  • July 22 — CFD Networkshop (Zoom)
  • October 21 — CFD Networkshop (Zoom)
WHY TEAM CFD?
  • Guidance and encouragement beyond compliance
  • Build connection across the CFD adviser family
  • Lift spirits and provide practical resources
  • Work together through the highs and lows of the financial industry
[Speaker notes for slide 38]
07.3 · PAT
CFD's Presidential Adviser Trip
KEY WEST, FLORIDA 2026 · CASA MARINA
Every Financial Adviser is Eligible!

Offered to the Top 25 Financial Advisers based on GDC through 12/31/2025. GDC includes variable products, Mutual Funds, Variable Annuities, Variable Life, Stocks, Bonds, Management Fees through Creative Financial Designs, and all fixed products through cfd Investments via National Account agreement.

Qualification Period (for 2026 trip)
January 1 – December 31, 2025
Minimum of 25 adviser attendees. If Top 25 cannot attend, next in rank invited.
Past Destinations
2025 — Turks & Caicos
2024 — Grand Cayman
2023 — Aruba
2022 — Playa del Carmen
2021 — Key Largo
2020 — Puerto Rico
2019 — Cabo San Lucas
2017 — Puerto Vallarta

ROCKPORT, MAINE 2026 · SAMOSET RESORT

Offered to the Top 15 advisers who exceed $100,000 of GDC in 2025, are age 45 or younger, do not qualify for the 2026 Presidential Adviser Trip, and have not qualified for the PAT more than three times.

January 1 – December 31, 2025

07.7 · CFD MASTERS
CFD Masters
TOP-TIER RECOGNITION FOR ELITE PRODUCTION

Recognizing advisers who have built lasting practices through excellence, integrity, and sustained production. CFD Masters are the cornerstone of the CFD adviser community — mentors, leaders, and examples of what the independent model can become.

Qualification
15+ Years  ·  Sustained Elite Production
Earned through consistency, not just volume.
What Masters Share
  • Deep client relationships built over decades
  • Mentorship of newer advisers in the community
  • Continuing education and practice-sharing leadership
  • Recognition at annual events

08.4 · MISSION
Our Mission
The CFD Companies strive to honor God through pursuing excellence in all that they do. As such, the mission of CFD is to empower financial advisers to serve their clients in a manner that demonstrates the fulfillment and freedom that is found in a relationship with Christ. Central to fulfillment of this mission is the uncompromising relationship-driven support that fiercely defends the independence of financial advisers to determine and implement what is best for each individual client. In everything else, CFD will remain agile, better equipped than others to meet the evolving needs of both financial advisers and their clients.
THANK YOU
BLUEPRINT: LOOK AHEAD TO 2026
Toll Free: 800.745.7776 · Phone: 765.453.9600 · Fax: 765.864.4080
